name: count_or_crash
description: Threshold + connectedComponents count. If count exceeds the configured limit, deliberately segfault to exercise framework crash isolation.

params.name: crash_when_count_above
params.doc: If connectedComponents (minus background) exceeds this, the plugin deliberately null-derefs. Used to test crash isolation.

outputs.name: count
outputs.doc: Connected components (excluding background). Only emitted on the non-crash path.

outputs.name: mask
outputs.doc: Threshold mask. Only emitted on the non-crash path.
